target_idiom: กินบนเรือนขี้บนหลังคา
target_meaning: to be ungrateful

source_idiom: von der Hand in den Mund leben
target_idiom: เกาะชายกระโปรง
source_meaning: to live paycheck to paycheck, hand-to-mouth
target_meaning: to depend on a woman for livelihood.

target_idiom: ไก่โห่
target_meaning: cockcrow.

source_idiom: mit jemandem ist nicht gut Kirschen essen
target_idiom: ขมิ้นกับปูน
source_meaning: it is difficult to get along with someone
target_meaning: incompatible; irreconcilable; disagreeing; typified by arguments, fights, or disagreements.

target_idiom: ขี่ช้างจับตั๊กแตน
target_meaning: To use a high amount of effort to carry out a little work; to do something with more force than is necessary.

target_idiom: เข้าโรง
source_meaning: to (be able to) come into play, be involved
target_meaning: to be in theatres; to start screening in theatres

target_idiom: ความวัวไม่ทันหาย ความควายเข้ามาแทรก
source_meaning: to rain buckets, to rain cats and dogs
target_meaning: when it rains, it pours.

target_idiom: จมปลัก
target_meaning: to remain (in a condition or place that is unpleasant or unlikely to lead to an improvement).

target_idiom: ใจคอ
target_meaning: state of mind; frame of mind; disposition; emotion; feeling; attitude.

target_idiom: ใจพระ
target_meaning: kind; kindhearted; benevolent; merciful.

target_idiom: ใจหิน
target_meaning: stonyhearted; hardhearted.

target_idiom: ชักน้ำเข้าลึก ชักศึกเข้าบ้าน
source_meaning: to entail, to implicate, to bring about
target_meaning: to bring a trouble or troublemaker to one's family, residence, base, society, etc.

target_idiom: ชั่วนาตาปี
target_meaning: all year round; always; continually; constantly; all the time; forever; eternally.

target_idiom: ได้หน้า
target_meaning: to receive good reputation, honour, credit, praise, compliment, etc.

target_idiom: ติดหู
target_meaning: ear-catching; catchy; memorable.

target_idiom: ถอนรากถอนโคน
target_meaning: to uproot; to annihilate; to exterminate.

target_idiom: เต็มร้อย
target_meaning: one hundred percent (fully; completely)

target_idiom: ถีบหัวส่ง
target_meaning: to expel, drive out, or sever relations with someone, especially when that one is of no more use.

target_idiom: ธารกำนัล
source_meaning: as a large group; with all of one's family, contents, and/or livestock
target_meaning: public; crowd; large group of persons.

target_idiom: น้ำใสใจคอ
target_meaning: true nature; true characteristic; unpretending mind; actual attitude; actual disposition.

target_idiom: นุ่งลมห่มฟ้า
target_meaning: to be naked; to wear no clothes.

target_idiom: ใบ้แดก
target_meaning: to be temporarily deprived of speech, especially by strong emotion.

target_idiom: ปลดแอก
target_meaning: to liberate, as from oppression, servitude, foreign control, social constraint, etc.

target_idiom: ปล่อยไก่
target_meaning: to make a fool of oneself.

source_idiom: sein Licht unter den Scheffel stellen
target_idiom: ปิดทองหลังพระ
source_meaning: to hide one's light under a bushel
target_meaning: to do good deeds without seeking attention or praise.

target_idiom: ปีหน้าฟ้าใหม่
source_meaning: hereafter, in future, in the future, for the future
target_meaning: new year; next year; year to come; year ahead.

target_idiom: ปีกกล้าขาแข็ง
source_meaning: to stand on one's own two feet
target_meaning: to be no longer needing to rely on someone else for help or support; to be capable of supporting or depending on oneself.

source_idiom: wer nie sein Brot im Bette aß, weiß nicht, wie Krümel piken
target_idiom: ผิดเป็นครู
source_meaning: one must experience something to understand it properly (but sometimes used without context merely for comedic effect)
target_meaning: Blunders are lessons. / Experience is the mother of wisdom.

target_idiom: ผีไม่มีศาล
target_meaning: homeless person.

source_idiom: sich etwas hinter die Ohren schreiben
target_idiom: แผลเก่า
target_meaning: unforgettable painful memory.

source_idiom: in einen Sack stecken und draufhauen
target_idiom: ผีเน่ากับโลงผุ
source_meaning: used to express that a particular group of people are all equally bad
target_meaning: bad or low persons deserving each other.

source_idiom: Tropfen, der das Fass zum Überlaufen bringt
target_idiom: ฟางเส้นสุดท้าย
source_meaning: final straw, last straw, the straw that broke the camel's back
target_meaning: last straw.

target_idiom: ไม่เต็มเต็ง
source_meaning: to be not the full shilling, to be on wass
target_meaning: half-witted.

target_idiom: ยอมงอ ไม่ยอมหัก
target_meaning: better bend than break.

target_idiom: ยักษ์มักกะสัน
source_meaning: to treat someone hard and ruthless
target_meaning: cruel or ruthless person

target_idiom: ยาใจ
source_meaning: cared about deeply, near and dear
target_meaning: beloved one; sweetheart.

target_idiom: ยิงกระต่าย
target_meaning: to urinate.

source_idiom: aus dem gleichen Holz geschnitzt sein
target_idiom: ลูกไม้หล่นไม่ไกลต้น
source_meaning: to be cut from the same cloth
target_meaning: the apple does not fall far from the tree

target_idiom: สมน้ำหน้า
target_meaning: used to express that someone deserves an unpleasant outcome: to have it coming; to serve someone right; etc.

target_idiom: สร้างภาพ
target_meaning: to create, publish, or promote a good image (of, about, etc); to propagandise (a good point of); to pretend, to act, or to put on an act (to make oneself, someone, or something look good); to be pretentious, fake, insincere, ingenuine, or hypocritic.

target_idiom: สันดอนขุดง่าย สันดานขุดยาก
target_meaning: it is not easy to fix a bad habit.

target_idiom: สิ้นไร้ไม้ตอก
target_meaning: very impoverished; experiencing serious financial hardship; penniless; penurious; extremely poor; needy.

target_idiom: สู้ยิบตา
source_meaning: to fight bravely, bear oneself bravely (especially in a losing situation)
target_meaning: to continue fighting despite difficulty or being unnerved; to fight without giving up

target_idiom: เสน่ห์ปลายจวัก
target_meaning: cooking talent.

source_idiom: vom Regen in die Traufe kommen
target_idiom: หนีเสือปะจระเข้
source_meaning: out of the frying pan, into the fire ‎(from a bad situation to a worse one‎)
target_meaning: to escape from one bad situation only to meet another bad situation.

target_idiom: หมาหัวเน่า
target_meaning: person generally despised or avoided: outcast, pariah, leper, etc.

target_idiom: หาเหาใส่หัว
source_meaning: to be up to no good
target_meaning: to look for trouble.

target_idiom: เหลือขอ
source_meaning: tough nut to crack, hard nut to crack
target_meaning: stubborn

target_idiom: ใหญ่หลวง
target_meaning: great (in size or effect).

source_idiom: etwas an die große Glocke hängen
target_idiom: แหกปาก
target_meaning: to shout; to whoop; to scream.

source_idiom: mit dem linken Fuß zuerst aufgestanden sein
target_idiom: แหกขี้ตา
source_meaning: to get up on the wrong side of the bed
target_meaning: to wake up or force oneself to wake up, especially when it is the time that one should sleep or it is so early or earlier than usual.

target_idiom: เอาลูกเขามาเลี้ยงเอาเมี่ยงเขามาอม
source_meaning: to take on one's debts, to make good
target_meaning: To take another person's duty or burden which can result in something unexpectable or unfavourable.
